monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles at Kuwait, Bahrain; Explosions Near Airbase Reported in Kuwait
Iran Launches Drone Strikes Targeting US Fifth Fleet in Bahrain, Air Raid Sirens Sound Across Manama

— S4 · Conflict · Manama, Bahrain · 10h ago. Iran has launched drone strikes against Bahrain, targeting the U.S. Fifth Fleet Headquarters, in retaliation for recent U.S. strikes on Iranian military infrastructure.
US Airstrike Hits School in Tehran, Kills Nearly 200
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 13h ago. A US airstrike struck a school in Tehran, killing nearly 200 children and adults, according to CNN sources, amid ongoing US strikes on Iran.
US Airstrikes Hit Iranian Air Defenses and IRGC Speedboats in Southern Iran After Hormuz Attacks
